caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex conceptual map on a black background. The map consists of various circular icons connected by blue lines, with text labels like "discomfort," "curiosity," and "meaning" placed along the connections. A small inset video in the upper right corner shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a dark shirt, speaking to the camera. The browser's address bar contains the URL "deck.teachable.com/trial-learning." The top of the browser displays multiple open tabs, including titles such as "Trial & Learning by Systemantics," "Future of Society by Systemantics," and "Rural Community Food System." Throughout the sequence, the screen remains largely static, with the primary movement occurring in the inset video as the man continues to talk and gesture slightly.
